function: Range join / distance join / broadcast index join / raster join / pushdown
reason_missing: The WASM build now wires the Sedona spatial join planner and supports verified relation joins, distance joins, and ST_KNN in a constrained browser execution profile. It still does not claim full native optimizer parity around spill, multi-partition out-of-core execution, broadcast index join orchestration, or raster-join-specific planning.
recommended_action: Keep the current planner-enabled browser MVP in place, document its limits clearly, and only reopen broader optimizer parity if we decide to port the native multi-partition/spill model to the browser runtime.
notes: This is behavioral/planner parity, not just function registration. See plans/optimizer-parity-note.md.
